data.content: Shipment blocked: pre-push hook fails because local tarpaulin coverage is 8870/9337 (94.998%), which is below the fail-under=95 threshold. This is pre-existing on the parent commit fd3945f. The merge was reverted on main. The feature branch knots-18e9-doctor-skills-fix is intact. Next step: add ~3 more covered lines to reliably pass the 95% boundary, then re-attempt shipment.
